headline: NIKE, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings and Conference Call
summary: BEAVERTON, Ore., May 28, 2026--NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) plans to release its fourth quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on Tuesday, June 30, 2026, at approximately 1:15 p.m. PT, following the close of regular stock market trading hours. Following the news release, NIKE, Inc. management will host a conference call beginning at 2:00 p.m. PT to review results.

headline: Hilma Closure Tests Nike’s Women’s Focus As Valuation Signals Diverge
summary: Hilma, a women-focused sneaker startup, has closed after running into inventory problems and a difficult funding backdrop. The exit removes a niche competitor that had targeted female runners with gender-specific shoe designs. This comes as NIKE (NYSE:NKE) faces weaker sales and pressure from smaller, specialized footwear brands. NIKE (NYSE:NKE) comes into this development with its stock under clear pressure, with shares at $45.98 and the price down 27.3% year to date and down 23.7% over...

headline: Has Nike Stock Lost Its Superpower?
summary: The stock’s bulls say margins will revert to normal once the sneaker maker regains its footing. But what if its superpower is gone for good?
